items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not confirm the expected outcome of the scenario where the group size changes after booking. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving multiple bookings, it does not provide specific details or validations regarding how the system handles changes in group size post-booking. Therefore, the requirement for deterministic validation of this scenario remains unaddressed, leading to an inconclusive status.
